hero.subtext: B.Tech, IIT Kanpur // Bitwise Inc. // Kota, India

manifesto.text: I am an AI developer and engineer based in Kota, India. Trained as a bioengineer at IIT Kanpur, I found my calling at the intersection of intelligent systems and software — building machines that think, speak, and act.

about: I am Sidharth Parihar — an AI Developer and engineer currently working at Bitwise Inc. in Kota, India. I hold a B.Tech in Bioengineering from IIT Kanpur, and I have spent the years since building systems at the frontier of artificial intelligence. My work spans autonomous agents, voice-enabled applications, and large-scale cloud deployments across Azure and AWS.

work.title: AGENTIC SYSTEMS
work.desc: I design autonomous agents that reason, plan, and execute — systems built to operate independently at scale.

work.title: RAG PIPELINES
work.desc: I architect retrieval systems that ground language models in real knowledge — making AI responses precise and trustworthy.

work.title: VOICE INTEGRATION
work.desc: I build applications that listen and speak — bringing natural voice interfaces to life using state-of-the-art speech models.

work.title: MODEL DISTILLATION
work.desc: I compress intelligence — taking large, powerful models and refining them into lean, production-ready systems.

work.title: CLOUD ARCHITECTURE
work.desc: I deploy and orchestrate AI workloads across cloud infrastructure — ensuring they are resilient, scalable, and production-grade.

experience.desc: Designing scalable Python solutions and architecting on Azure. Building datasets, deploying RAG pipelines, and integrating voice models (Whisper, Deepgram).
Developed a strong analytical foundation for problem-solving in complex systems.

github_projects.title: xsound
github_projects.desc: Rust-based audio routing engine and interface.
